title: Slovakian Noodle Dish
description: A hearty and comforting Slovakian-inspired noodle dish. The combination of tender noodles, savory meat, and flavorful spices will transport your taste buds to Eastern Europe.
instructions: Brown the ground beef in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the caraway seeds and cook for 1 minute.
Add the noodles to the pan and stir to combine.
Add the milk and stir to combine.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Simmer the dish for 10-15 minutes or until the noodles are cooked through.
